'''lasafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalassology|thalassology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalassology|thalassology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lasafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læsæfæth|læsæfæth]] || [[word:læsæfæj|læsæfæj]] || [[word:læsæfæsh|læsæfæsh]] || [[word:læsæfæ|læsæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lasasafath|lasasafath]] || [[word:lasasafaj|lasasafaj]] || [[word:lasasafash|lasasafash]] || [[word:lasasafa|lasasafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lasafath|lasafath]] || [[word:lasafaj|lasafaj]] || [[word:lasafash|lasafash]] || [[word:lasafa|lasafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lasaffath|lasaffath]] || [[word:lasaffaj|lasaffaj]] || [[word:lasaffash|lasaffash]] || [[word:lasaffaf|lasaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lasafatha|lasafatha]] || [[word:lasafaja|lasafaja]] || [[word:lasafasha|lasafasha]] || [[word:lasafaka|lasafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lasafath|lasafath]] || [[word:lasafaj|lasafaj]] || [[word:lasafash|lasafash]] || [[word:lasafa|lasafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lasafathal|lasafathal]] || [[word:lasafajal|lasafajal]] || [[word:lasafashal|lasafashal]] || [[word:lasafakal|lasafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lasafathatha|lasafathatha]] || [[word:lasafajaja|lasafajaja]] || [[word:lasafashasha|lasafashasha]] || [[word:lasafaka|lasafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lasafathan|lasafathan]] || [[word:lasafajan|lasafajan]] || [[word:lasafashan|lasafashan]] || [[word:lasafakan|lasafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lasafathaoro|lasafathaoro]] || [[word:lasafajaoro|lasafajaoro]] || [[word:lasafashaoro|lasafashaoro]] || [[word:lasafakaoro|lasafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
